toolUseCases.claude: Gamitin kapag gusto mo ng matibay na mga daloy ng trabaho sa pagpaplano at mahabang multi-file refactor na may Claude Code.
toolUseCases.codex: Gamitin kapag ang iyong koponan ay na-standardize sa mga daloy ng OpenAI Codex CLI at profile-based na auth.
toolUseCases.droid: Gamitin kapag kailangan mo ng lightweight na terminal agent na nakatuon sa mabilis na coding at command execution loops.
toolUseCases.openclaw: Gamitin kapag gusto mo ng Open Claw style coding agent ngunit naruta sa pamamagitan ng mga patakaran ng OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.cline: Gamitin kapag nag-configure ka ng mga ahente ng coding sa loob ng mga editor at gusto mo ng may gabay na pag-setup gamit ang mga modelong OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.kilo: Gamitin kapag nakadepende ang iyong daloy ng trabaho sa mga command ng Kilo Code at mabilis na umuulit na pag-edit.
toolUseCases.cursor: Gamitin kapag nagko-coding sa Cursor at kailangan mo ng mga custom na modelong katugma sa OpenAI sa pamamagitan ng OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.continue: Gamitin kapag nagpapatakbo ng Magpatuloy sa mga IDE at kailangan mo ng portable JSON-based na configuration ng provider.
toolUseCases.opencode: Gamitin kapag mas gusto mo ang terminal-native agent run at scripted automation sa pamamagitan ng OpenCode.
toolUseCases.kiro: Gamitin kapag isinasama ang Kiro at kinokontrol ang pagruruta ng modelo sa gitna mula sa OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.antigravity: Gamitin kapag ang trapiko ng Antigravity/Kiro ay dapat ma-intercept sa MITM at iruta sa OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.copilot: Gamitin kapag gusto mong Copilot chat style UX habang ipinapatupad ang mga OmniRoute key at mga panuntunan sa pagruruta.
toolUseCases.windsurf: Use when you want an AI-first IDE with Codeium/Windsurf models routed through OmniRoute.
toolUseCases.amp: Use when you want Amp CLI routed through OmniRoute with stable shorthand aliases and OpenAI-compatible setup.
toolUseCases.qwen: Use when you want Qwen Code CLI with OmniRoute-managed provider settings and multi-provider model access.

priority.when: You have one preferred model and only want fallback on failure.
priority.avoid: You need request distribution across models.
priority.example: Primary coding model with cheaper backup for outages.

weighted.when: You need controlled traffic split across models.
weighted.avoid: You cannot maintain accurate weights over time.

round-robin.when: You want predictable and even distribution.
round-robin.avoid: Masyadong malaki ang pagkakaiba ng mga modelo sa latency o gastos.
round-robin.example: Parehong modelo sa maraming account upang maikalat ang throughput.

random.when: You want simple distribution with minimal setup.

least-used.when: You want adaptive balancing based on live demand.
least-used.avoid: Traffic is too low to benefit from usage balancing.
least-used.example: Mixed workloads where one model often gets overloaded.

cost-optimized.when: Cost reduction is your top priority.
cost-optimized.avoid: Pricing data is missing or outdated.
cost-optimized.example: Background or batch jobs where lower cost is preferred.

strict-random.when: Use when you want perfectly even spread — each model used once before repeating.
strict-random.avoid: Avoid when models have different quality or latency and order matters.
strict-random.example: Example: Multiple accounts of the same model to distribute usage evenly.

context-relay.example: Example: Codex sessions that rotate across multiple accounts near quota exhaustion.
context-relay.when: Use when long sessions must survive account rotation without losing the working context.
context-relay.avoid: Avoid when account switching is rare or when you do not want extra summarization requests.

p2c.when: Use when you want low-latency selection using Power-of-Two-Choices algorithm.
p2c.example: Example: High-throughput inference across 4+ equivalent model endpoints.
p2c.avoid: Avoid for small combos with 2 or fewer models — no benefit over round-robin.

advancedHelp.maxRetries: Ilang muling pagsubok ang sinubukan bago mabigo ang isang kahilingan.
advancedHelp.retryDelay: Initial wait between retries. Higher values reduce burst pressure.
advancedHelp.healthcheck: Skips unhealthy models/providers from routing decisions.
advancedHelp.concurrencyPerModel: Max simultaneous requests allowed per model in round-robin.
advancedHelp.queueTimeout: How long a request can wait in queue before timing out.

priority.title: Fail-safe baseline
priority.description: Use one primary model and keep fallback chain short and reliable.
priority.tip1: Put your most reliable model first.
priority.tip2: Keep 1-2 backup models with similar quality.
priority.tip3: Use safe retries to absorb transient provider failures.

weighted.title: Controlled traffic split
weighted.description: Great for canary rollouts and gradual migration between models.
weighted.tip2: Keep the total at 100% and auto-balance after changes.
weighted.tip3: Monitor success and latency before increasing canary weight.

round-robin.title: Predictable load sharing
round-robin.description: Best when models are equivalent and you need smooth distribution.
round-robin.tip2: Set concurrency limits to avoid burst overload.
round-robin.tip3: Use queue timeout to fail fast under saturation.

random.title: Quick spread with low setup
random.description: Use when you need simple distribution without strict guarantees.
random.tip1: Use models with similar latency profiles.
random.tip2: Keep retries enabled to absorb random misses.
random.tip3: Prefer this for experimentation, not strict SLAs.

least-used.title: Adaptive balancing
least-used.description: Routes to less-used models to reduce hotspots over time.
least-used.tip2: Combine with health checks for safer balancing.
least-used.tip3: Track per-model usage to validate distribution gains.

cost-optimized.title: Budget-first routing
cost-optimized.description: Routes to lower-cost models when pricing metadata is available.
cost-optimized.tip1: Ensure pricing coverage for all selected models.
cost-optimized.tip2: Keep a quality fallback for hard prompts.
cost-optimized.tip3: Use for batch/background jobs where cost is the main KPI.

strict-random.title: Shuffle deck distribution
strict-random.description: Each model is used exactly once per cycle before reshuffling.
strict-random.tip1: Use at least 2 models for meaningful distribution.
strict-random.tip3: Ideal for load balancing across multiple API accounts.

Merged after OmniRoute adds auth from the provider API key. If a custom header uses the same name as an existing one (e.g. Authorization), your value fully replaces the auto-generated header (including the Bearer token) — the upstream only sees what you typed, not the key from settings. Saves on blur, outside click, or closing this panel.

settings.title: Mga setting
settings.routingSettingsIntro: Kinokontrol kung paano niruruta, binago, at ipinapadala ang iyong mga kahilingan sa mga provider ng AI.
settings.routingOpDropParagraphContainsDesc: __MISSING__:Removes any paragraph (text block split on blank lines) inside the system prompt whose text contains ANY of the listed substrings. Use to strip third-party client fingerprints like 'github.com/anomalyco/opencode' or 'docs.openwebui.com' that Anthropic's classifier flags.
settings.routingOpDropParagraphStartsWithDesc: __MISSING__:Removes any paragraph that STARTS WITH one of the listed prefixes. Use for identity lines like 'You are OpenCode' or 'You are Open WebUI' that announce the calling client.
settings.routingOpReplaceTextDesc: __MISSING__:Replaces a literal substring with another literal substring. Use for known trigger phrases — e.g. rewrite 'Here is some useful information about the environment you are running in:' to 'Environment context you are running in:' (an empirically-validated trigger phrase).
settings.routingOpReplaceRegexDesc: __MISSING__:Replaces text matching a regular expression. Use when you need patterns (character classes, optional whitespace, anchors) instead of literal substrings. A malformed pattern is caught at runtime when the op runs.
settings.routingOpDropBlockContainsDesc: __MISSING__:Removes ENTIRE system blocks (not just paragraphs) whose text contains any of the listed substrings. Use when a whole block is fingerprint-bearing and you want it gone — e.g. an injected MCP-server description.
settings.routingOpPrependSystemBlockDesc: __MISSING__:Inserts a new text block at the FRONT of the system array. Use to add the SDK identity 'You are a Claude agent, built on Anthropic's Claude Agent SDK.' that Anthropic's classifier expects.
settings.routingOpAppendSystemBlockDesc: __MISSING__:Inserts a new text block at the END of the system array. Use for cosmetic additions that don't need to be at position [0].
settings.routingOpInjectBillingHeaderDesc: __MISSING__:Prepends the special 'x-anthropic-billing-header: cc_version=...; cc_entrypoint=...; cch=...;' text block that Anthropic's classifier validates. Required for CC bridge relay endpoints; for the native claude provider OmniRoute already injects its own billing line so this op is usually redundant there.
settings.routingOpObfuscateWordsDesc: __MISSING__:Inserts a Zero-Width-Joiner character after the first letter of each listed word, so 'opencode' becomes 'o‍pencode'. Reads identical to humans but bypasses classifier word matches. Targets system blocks, user/assistant messages, and tool descriptions.
settings.routingNeedlesHint: __MISSING__:List of substrings. A paragraph matches if it contains ANY one of them. Add one per line via 'Add entry'.
settings.routingPrefixesHint: __MISSING__:List of strings. A paragraph matches if it starts with any one of them (leading whitespace is trimmed before matching).
settings.routingCaseSensitiveHint: __MISSING__:When ON, 'OpenCode' and 'opencode' are different strings. When OFF (default), the comparison ignores case.
settings.routingMatchLiteralHint: __MISSING__:Exact literal substring to find. No regex syntax — special chars like . * ? are treated as themselves.
settings.routingReplacementTextHint: __MISSING__:Replacement string. Leave blank to delete the match. The output preserves surrounding text.
settings.routingAllOccurrencesHint: __MISSING__:When ON (default), every instance is replaced. When OFF, only the first match is replaced.
settings.routingPatternHint: __MISSING__:JavaScript regex source. Don't wrap in slashes — just 'foo(.*)bar'. Server rejects patterns that fail to compile.
settings.routingRegexFlagsHint: __MISSING__:JavaScript regex flags (g = all matches, i = case-insensitive, s = dot matches newline, m = multiline). Default 'g'.
settings.routingBlockTextHint: __MISSING__:Full text of the new system block. Use a literal string; the system block stores text only.
settings.routingIdempotencyKeyHint: __MISSING__:Optional. If set, the op skips when a block whose text starts with this key is already present. Prevents double-prepend on retries.
settings.routingBillingEntrypointHint: __MISSING__:Value injected as 'cc_entrypoint='. Anthropic accepts 'sdk-cli' (Agent SDK), 'cli' (Claude Code CLI), or other documented values.
settings.routingBillingVersionFormatHint: __MISSING__:How the 3-char build hash after cc_version= is computed. 'ex-machina' = sha256 of CCH_SALT+chars-from-first-user-msg+version (per-message). 'omniroute-daystamp' = sha256 of YYYY-MM-DD+version (stable per-day).
settings.routingBillingCchAlgoHint: __MISSING__:How the 5-char cch= token is computed. 'sha256-first-user' = sha256 of first user message text. 'xxhash64-body' = body-level signing fills it later. 'static-zero' = literal '00000' placeholder.
settings.routingObfuscateWordsHint: __MISSING__:Lowercase words to obfuscate. ZWJ insertion is applied case-insensitively, so 'opencode' also matches 'OpenCode' and 'OPENCODE'.
settings.routingObfuscateTargetsHint: __MISSING__:Which body regions to scan for the words: system blocks, user/assistant messages, and/or tool descriptions.
settings.routingOpSummaryCount: __MISSING__:{count, plural, =0 {no ops} one {# op} other {# ops}}

translator.title: Tagasalin
translator.metaDescription: I-debug, subukan, at i-visualize ang mga pagsasalin ng format ng API sa pagitan ng mga provider
translator.modeDescriptionPlayground: I-paste ang anumang nilalaman ng kahilingan sa API at tingnan kung paano ito isinasalin ng OmniRoute sa pagitan ng mga format ng provider (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API)
translator.modeDescriptionChatTester: Magpadala ng mga totoong kahilingan sa chat sa pamamagitan ng OmniRoute at siyasatin ang buong round-trip: input, isinaling kahilingan, tugon ng provider, at isinalin na output.
translator.modeDescriptionTestBench: Magpatakbo ng mga paunang natukoy na sitwasyon at ihambing ang pagiging tugma sa mga provider at modelo.
translator.modeDescriptionLiveMonitor: Panoorin ang mga kaganapan sa pagsasalin sa real time habang dumadaloy ang mga kahilingan sa pamamagitan ng OmniRoute.
translator.modeDescriptionFallback: I-debug, subukan, at i-visualize kung paano isinasalin ng OmniRoute ang mga kahilingan ng API sa pagitan ng mga provider.
translator.eventsAppearHint: Lumalabas dito ang mga kaganapan sa pagsasalin habang dumadaloy ang mga kahilingan sa pamamagitan ng OmniRoute. Gamitin ang alinman sa mga paraang ito upang bumuo ng mga kaganapan:
translator.externalApiCalls: Panlabas na mga tawag sa API
translator.inMemoryNote: Tandaan: Ang mga kaganapan ay iniimbak sa memorya at nire-reset kapag nag-restart ang server.
translator.formatConverterDescription: Mag-paste o mag-type ng JSON request body. Awtomatikong ide-detect ng translator ang source format at iko-convert ito sa target na format. Gamitin ito para i-debug kung paano isinasalin ng OmniRoute ang mga kahilingan sa pagitan ng mga format (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API).
translator.inputPlaceholder: Mag-paste ng katawan ng kahilingan dito o pumili ng template sa ibaba...
translator.templateLoadHint: Nilo-load ng template ang kahilingan sa {format} na format. Baguhin ang Source Format upang mag-load sa ibang format.
translator.testBenchDescription: Magpatakbo ng mga paunang natukoy na sitwasyon (Simple Chat, Tool Calling, atbp.) upang i-verify ang pagsasalin at pagiging tugma ng provider. Pumili ng source format at target na provider, pagkatapos ay patakbuhin ang lahat ng pagsubok para makakita ng porsyento ng compatibility. Gamitin ito para malaman kung aling mga feature ang gumagana sa mga provider.

landing.heroDescription: AI endpoint proxy na may web dashboard - Isang JavaScript port ng CLIProxyAPI. Gumagana nang walang putol sa Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cline, RooCode, at iba pang mga tool sa CLI.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Lahat ng kailangan mo para pamahalaan ang iyong imprastraktura ng AI sa isang lugar, na binuo para sa sukat.
landing.featureUnifiedEndpointDesc: I-access ang lahat ng provider sa pamamagitan ng iisang standard API URL.
landing.featureEasySetupDesc: Bumangon at tumakbo sa loob ng ilang minuto gamit ang npx command.
landing.featureModelFallbackDesc: Awtomatikong ilipat ang mga provider sa pagkabigo o mataas na latency.

landing.howItWorksDescription: Walang putol na dumadaloy ang data mula sa iyong aplikasyon sa pamamagitan ng aming intelligent na layer ng pagruruta patungo sa pinakamahusay na provider para sa trabaho.
landing.howItWorksStep1Description: Magsisimula ang iyong mga kahilingan sa iyong mga paboritong tool o sa aming pinag-isang SDK. Baguhin lang ang base URL.
landing.howItWorksStep2Description: Sinusuri ng aming engine ang prompt, sinusuri ang kalusugan ng provider, at mga ruta para sa pinakamababang latency o gastos.
landing.howItWorksStep3Description: Ang kahilingan ay agad na tinutupad ng OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, o iba pa.

docs.featureRoutingText: Iruta ang mga kahilingan sa 30+ AI provider sa pamamagitan ng isang endpoint na katugma sa OpenAI. Sinusuportahan ang chat, mga tugon, audio, at image API.

docs.protocolsDescription: Ang OmniRoute ay naglalantad ng dalawang operational protocol bilang karagdagan sa mga OpenAI-compatible na API: MCP para sa tool execution at A2A para sa agent-to-agent na daloy ng trabaho.
docs.protocolMcpDesc: Gamitin ang MCP sa stdio upang hayaan ang mga kliyente na tumuklas at tumawag sa mga tool ng OmniRoute na may visibility sa pag-audit.
docs.protocolMcpStep1: Simulan ang MCP transport gamit ang `omniroute --mcp`.
docs.protocolMcpStep2: Ituro ang iyong MCP client sa stdio transport.
docs.protocolMcpStep3: Tumawag sa `omniroute_get_health` at `omniroute_list_combos` para i-validate ang pagkakakonekta.
docs.protocolA2aDesc: Gamitin ang A2A JSON-RPC upang magsumite ng mga gawain nang sabay-sabay o sa pamamagitan ng SSE streaming.
docs.protocolA2aStep1: Basahin ang `/.well-known/agent.json` para sa pagtuklas ng ahente.
docs.protocolA2aStep2: Ipadala ang `message/send` o `message/stream` ng mga kahilingan sa `POST /a2a`.
docs.protocolA2aStep3: Pamahalaan ang lifecycle ng gawain sa `tasks/get` at `tasks/cancel`.
docs.protocolTroubleshooting1: Kung offline ang status ng MCP, i-verify na tumatakbo ang proseso ng stdio at nag-a-update ang heartbeat file.
docs.protocolTroubleshooting2: Kung mananatili ang mga gawain sa A2A sa `working`, siyasatin ang `/api/a2a/tasks/:id` at i-stream ang mga kaganapan para sa estado ng terminal.
docs.protocolTroubleshooting3: Gamitin ang `/dashboard/mcp` at `/dashboard/a2a` para sa operational controls at audit visibility.

legal.privacyMetadataDescription: Patakaran sa privacy para sa proxy router ng OmniRoute AI API.
legal.termsMetadataDescription: Mga tuntunin ng serbisyo para sa proxy router ng OmniRoute AI API.
legal.privacySection1Text: Ang OmniRoute ay idinisenyo bilang isang local-first application. Ang lahat ng pagproseso at pag-iimbak ng data ay ganap na nangyayari sa iyong makina. Walang sentralisadong server na kumukolekta ng iyong impormasyon.
legal.privacyDataStoredIn: Ang sumusunod na data ay lokal na nakaimbak sa
legal.privacyDataProviderConfigurationsDesc: mga URL ng koneksyon, mga uri ng provider, at mga setting ng priyoridad
legal.privacyDataApiKeysDesc: naka-encrypt at lokal na nakaimbak para sa pagpapatotoo sa mga tagapagbigay ng AI
legal.privacyDataUsageLogsDesc: bilang ng kahilingan, paggamit ng token, pangalan ng modelo, timestamp, at oras ng pagtugon
legal.privacyDataApplicationSettingsDesc: mga kagustuhan sa tema, diskarte sa pagruruta, at mga pagsasaayos ng combo
legal.privacySection3Text: Ang OmniRoute ay hindi nangongolekta ng telemetry, analytics, o mga ulat ng pag-crash. Walang data na ipinapadala sa amin o anumang third party. Ang iyong mga pattern ng paggamit, mga tawag sa API, at mga configuration ay nananatiling ganap na pribado.
legal.privacySection4Text: Kapag gumawa ka ng mga tawag sa API sa pamamagitan ng OmniRoute, ipapasa ang iyong mga kahilingan sa mga AI provider na iyong na-configure (halimbawa: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google). Ang mga provider na ito ay may sariling mga patakaran sa privacy na namamahala sa kung paano nila pinangangasiwaan ang iyong data. Mangyaring suriin:
legal.privacySection5Text: Kung ie-enable mo ang opsyonal na feature ng cloud sync, maaaring mailipat ang mga configuration ng provider at API key sa isang naka-configure na cloud endpoint. Ang tampok na ito ay hindi pinagana bilang default at nangangailangan ng tahasang pag-opt-in.
legal.privacyLoggingIntro: Maaaring i-configure ang mga log ng kahilingan sa pamamagitan ng mga setting ng dashboard. Maaari mong:
legal.privacySection7TextStart: Dahil ang lahat ng data ay lokal na nakaimbak, mayroon kang ganap na kontrol. Maaari mong tanggalin ang iyong data anumang oras sa pamamagitan ng pag-alis ng
legal.privacySection7TextEnd: direktoryo o gamit ang database backup at restore na mga feature sa dashboard.
legal.termsSection1Text: Ang OmniRoute ay isang local-first AI API proxy router na ganap na gumagana sa iyong makina. Nagruruta ito ng mga kahilingan sa maraming AI provider na may load balancing, failover, at pagsubaybay sa paggamit.
legal.termsResponsibilityApiKeys: Ikaw ang tanging responsable para sa pamamahala ng iyong sariling mga API key at kredensyal para sa mga third-party na tagapagbigay ng AI (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, atbp.).
legal.termsResponsibilityCompliance: Dapat kang sumunod sa mga tuntunin ng serbisyo ng bawat tagapagbigay ng AI na ang API ay ina-access mo sa pamamagitan ng OmniRoute.
legal.termsResponsibilitySecurity: Responsable ka para sa seguridad ng iyong lokal na pag-install ng OmniRoute, kabilang ang pagtatakda ng password at paghihigpit sa pag-access sa network.
legal.termsSection3Text: Ang OmniRoute ay gumaganap bilang isang intermediary proxy. Ang mga tawag sa API na ipinadala sa OmniRoute ay isinalin at ipinapasa sa iyong na-configure na mga provider ng AI. Hindi binabago ng OmniRoute ang nilalaman ng iyong mga kahilingan o tugon sa kabila ng kinakailangang pagsasalin ng protocol.
legal.termsDataStoredLocally: Ang lahat ng data ay lokal na nakaimbak sa iyong makina sa isang database ng SQLite.
legal.termsNoTransmission: Ang OmniRoute ay hindi nagpapadala ng anumang data sa mga panlabas na server maliban kung tahasan mong pinagana ang mga feature ng cloud sync.
legal.termsDataLocationText: Ang mga log ng paggamit, API key, at configuration ay naka-store sa
legal.termsSection5Text: Ang OmniRoute ay ibinigay "as is" nang walang anumang uri ng warranty. Hindi kami mananagot para sa anumang mga gastos na natamo sa pamamagitan ng paggamit ng API, pagkaantala ng serbisyo, o pagkawala ng data. Palaging panatilihin ang mga backup ng iyong configuration.
legal.termsSection6Text: Ang OmniRoute ay open-source na software. Malaya kang suriin, baguhin, at ipamahagi ito sa ilalim ng mga tuntunin ng lisensya nito.

cache.description: Monitor and manage semantic response cache, hit rates, and token savings.

cache.unavailableDesc: Could not fetch cache statistics. Make sure the server is running.
cache.semanticCacheDisabledDesc: Semantic cache is disabled. OmniRoute will skip local response reuse until you turn it back on in Settings.
cache.semanticEntriesDesc: Persisted semantic cache records currently stored in SQLite. Provider-side prompt cache activity is not listed here.
cache.providerCacheRateDesc: Each provider exposes total input tokens, cache read tokens, and cache write tokens so you can verify the reuse ratio against raw totals.
cache.promptTrendDesc: Hourly request volume, cache coverage, and cache read volume across the last 24 hours.
cache.noTrendData: No prompt cache activity has been recorded over the last 24 hours.
cache.semanticCacheSectionDesc: OmniRoute's own deterministic response cache. When enabled, repeated non-streaming temperature=0 requests can be served locally without hitting the upstream provider.
cache.noPromptCacheData: No provider-side prompt cache activity has been recorded yet.
cache.promptCacheSectionDesc: Shows provider-side prompt caching activity from usage history so you can see where cache control is active and how much input reuse you are getting.

quotaShare.betaDescription: Configuration is saved in localStorage (not yet persisted on the server). Per-request cap enforcement is not yet wired into the proxy pipeline. This screen lets you design and visualize the quota split; real enforcement will land in a future iteration with DB persistence and upstream call interception.
quotaShare.emptyDescription: Create a pool to assign API keys to share a provider's quota window with % allocations.
quotaShare.noEligibleConnections: No connections with quota data. Refresh from /dashboard/quota first.
quotaShare.duplicatePoolError: A pool for this connection + window already exists
quotaShare.noKeysAdded: No keys allocated. Add one below.
quotaShare.betaConfigSavedSuffix: (hindi pa nagpapatuloy sa server). Ang pagpapatupad ng cap sa bawat kahilingan ay hindi pa naka-wire sa proxy pipeline. Hinahayaan ka ng screen na ito na idisenyo at mailarawan ang paghahati ng quota; ang tunay na pagpapatupad ay darating sa isang pag-ulit sa hinaharap na may DB pagtitiyaga at upstream na pagharang ng tawag.
quotaShare.conceptIntro: __MISSING__:Quota Share divides a provider's quota among multiple API keys using work-conserving fair-share: each key receives a proportional slice but can borrow from the free balance without exceeding the global cap.
quotaShare.conceptFairShare: __MISSING__:Fair-share: each key receives quota proportional to its configured weight
quotaShare.conceptBorrowing: __MISSING__:Borrowing: keys can consume free balance from others without breaching the cap
quotaShare.conceptGlobalCap: __MISSING__:Hard global cap: the provider's absolute limit is never exceeded
quotaShare.conceptWindows: __MISSING__:Windows: 5h, hourly, daily, weekly, monthly — each tracked independently
quotaShare.conceptKeyHowDesc: __MISSING__:Create the key normally in API Keys — it appears in the wizard's key step automatically. Tick Exclusive there to make it quota-only. No separate enable step.
quotaShare.conceptExclusiveDesc: __MISSING__:An exclusive key only sees/uses the pool's quotaShared-* models — every other model is hidden from its /v1/models and blocked.
quotaShare.wizardStep1Subtitle: __MISSING__:Select the provider account this pool will share quota for, set a name and default policy.
quotaShare.wizardStep2Subtitle: __MISSING__:Define the quota plan dimensions (unit, window, limit) for the chosen connection. Leave unchanged to keep current settings.
quotaShare.wizardStep3Subtitle: __MISSING__:Assign API keys to this pool with weight % allocations and optional caps.
quotaShare.wizardDimensionsEditedNotice: __MISSING__:Dimensions edited — will be saved as a manual override when the pool is created.
quotaShare.wizardExclusiveHint: __MISSING__:When enabled, these API keys will only be allowed to use this pool's virtual models (allowedQuotas reconciliation is applied on save).
quotaShare.wizardAdditionalConnectionsNote: __MISSING__:Additional connections use their catalog default limits (editable later).
quotaShare.groupAllocationNote: __MISSING__:Allocations apply to all pools in this group via the shared quota layer.
quotaShare.endpointsHint: __MISSING__:Call these virtual models with any allocated key — routing + quota are handled per group.
quotaShare.betaText: __MISSING__:Quota Share is functional but bugs are expected. Found one? Please report it.
quotaShare.deleteGroupConfirm: __MISSING__:Delete this group? Its pools must be reassigned or removed first.
quotaShare.deleteGroupHasPools: __MISSING__:This group still has pools — reassign or delete them first.
quotaShare.ungroupedHint: __MISSING__:These pools are not assigned to a known group. Edit a pool to move it into a real group.
